subcodes.first_line: O ye beloved friends of His Beauty! God has made the love of his friends as equal to the love of Himself
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان جانی حضرت احدیت محبت دوستانش را محبت خویش فرمود و نوازش یاران را
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @love of God, @unity; oneness of humanity, @service to others; to the Cause of God
